scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:sandbox"
scripts.build: tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/worker/tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/sandbox/tsconfig.json
scripts.check:refactor-guards: npm run check:no-testcase-text-cache-refs && npm run check:no-execution-mode-refs && npm run check:no-cross-app-imports && npm run check:no-runtime-barrel-imports && npm run check:no-runtime-judge-queue-inline-bootstrap && npm run check:no-sandbox-singleton-imports && npm run check:no-worker-singleton-imports && npm run check:no-api-bootstrap-side-effects && npm run check:no-api-route-side-effects && npm run check:no-api-service-singletons && npm run check:no-api-controller-self-instantiation && npm run check:no-api-simple-service-self-instantiation && npm run check:no-api-judge-service-self-instantiation && npm run check:no-api-exam-orchestration-self-instantiation && npm run check:no-api-content-notify-service-self-instantiation && npm run check:no-api-auth-boundary-self-instantiation && npm run check:no-api-email-inline-transporter-bootstrap && npm run check:no-api-leaderboard-direct-wiring && npm run check:no-api-realtime-inline-bootstrap && npm run check:no-api-repository-self-instantiation && npm run check:no-worker-inline-bootstrap && npm run check:no-runtime-code-service-singletons && npm run check:no-sandbox-service-inline-deps && npm run check:no-shared-utils-inline-bootstrap
scripts.test:runtime-open-handles: jest --runInBand --detectOpenHandles --runTestsByPath tests/unit/services/challenge.service.test.ts tests/unit/services/favorite.service.test.ts tests/unit/services/submission.service.test.ts tests/unit/api/judge-route-composition.test.ts tests/unit/worker/worker.service.test.ts tests/unit/worker/worker.server.test.ts
